basic_details.job_title: Allahabad University Controller of Examination Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad University Controller of Examination Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Allahabad University Controller of Examination Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 57 years Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent Grade 'B' in UGC seven point scale, At least 15 years experience as Assistant Professor in Level 11 and above or 8 years in Level 12 and above including Associate Professor with educational administration experience, Comparable experience in research establishment and/or other institution of higher education, 15 years of administrative experience of which 8 years shall be as Deputy Registrar or equivalent post
qualification.details: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent Grade 'B' in UGC seven point scale. At least 15 years experience as Assistant Professor in Level 11 and above or 8 years in Level 12 and above including Associate Professor with educational administration experience. Comparable experience in research establishment and/or other institution of higher education. 15 years of administrative experience of which 8 years shall be as Deputy Registrar or equivalent post.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Controller of Examination Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.allduniv.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Controller of Examination post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Controller of Examination post at Allahabad University is 23rd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent Grade 'B' in the UGC seven-point scale, along with significant administrative and teaching experience as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Controller of Examination position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Controller of Examination post is 57 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: For General and OBC category candidates, the application fee is Rs. 1500/-. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Controller of Examination recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Controller of Examination post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be appointed at Pay Level-14, which offers a competitive salary structure as per the university's norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies released?
faq.answer: Allahabad University has released a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Controller of Examination in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Controller of Examination post will primarily involve an Interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST category candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 600/-. Ensure the payment is made correctly as per the guidelines.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Allahabad University, the link for which is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
